name: Rorschach / Subjective Prompt With A Fixed Rubric
description: Load five visually ambiguous ink materials one at a time, physically run two generated material tests on every specimen, and stamp the only card matching both response signatures.
natural_language: Initial appearance is non-diagnostic. Select each specimen card and physically run both highlighted material tests, observe and compare all ten transient responses, then drag the verification stamp to the only specimen matching both rubric signatures.

metadata.variant_count_kind: tool-pair rubric, per-specimen response matrix, culprit specimen, labels, and blot-shape combinations
metadata.notes: Five initially equivalent inkblots must be loaded and interrogated individually. The verifier independently replays ten specimen-bound physical experiments, all 70 transient response samples, and the final stamp drag without trusting a client-side answer flag.
